title: poa palustris f. pauciflora
intro: Poa palustris f. pauciflora is a lesser-known variant of the wetland bluegrass plant, specifically characterized by its limited flowering habit. Traditionally, this plant has been utilized in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. It is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Poa palustris f. pauciflora is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
